# Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

# Testing

List the checks you ran or explain why testing was not possible.

# Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable.
- [ ] I updated docs or project metadata if needed.
- [ ] I added or preserved SPDX metadata on new tracked files.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes when applicable.
